---
title: "Contact"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body, .quarto-container, #quarto-content, main, .page-columns {
    background-color: #87CEEB !important;
    font-family: Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 16px !important;
  }

  .navbar, header.navbar {
    background-color: #003366 !important;
  }
  .navbar .navbar-brand,
  .navbar .nav-link,
  .navbar-nav .nav-link {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    font-family: Georgia, serif !important;
  }
  .navbar .nav-link:hover { color: #cce0ff !important; }

  .contact-wrapper {
    padding: 40px 20px;
    color: #111;
    font-family: Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 16px !important;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }
  .contact-wrapper form input,
  .contact-wrapper form textarea {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 500px;
    padding: 8px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    border: 1px solid #003366;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-family: Georgia, serif;
    background-color: #ffffff;
  }
  .contact-wrapper form button {
    margin-top: 10px;
    padding: 10px 24px;
    background-color: #003366;
    color: #ffffff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-family: Georgia, serif;
  }
  .contact-wrapper form button:hover { background-color: #001f4d; }

  .nav-footer {
    background-color: #003366 !important;
    color: #ffffff !important;
  }
  .nav-footer a { color: #cce0ff !important; }
</style>

<div class="contact-wrapper">

You can reach me via:

- **Email:** caito@example.com
- **LinkedIn:** <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yourname/">linkedin.com/in/yourname</a>
- **GitHub:** <a href="https://github.com/cait-oreilly">github.com/cait-oreilly</a>

Or fill out the contact form below:

<form>
  <label>Name:</label><br>
  <input type="text" name="name"><br><br>
  <label>Email:</label><br>
  <input type="email" name="email"><br><br>
  <label>Message:</label><br>
  <textarea name="message" rows="5"></textarea><br><br>
  <button type="submit">Send</button>
</form>

</div>
```
